title: Chef Aid Non-Stick Spring Form Cake Tin, Round Cake pan with Loose Base for Easy Release, Fridge and Freezer Safe. Grey, 20 x 6.8 cm
features: EVERDAY USE: This non-stick, easy clean, round cake tin is ideal for baking traditional Victoria sponges and other light cakes, handwash recommended

EASY RELEASE WITH REMOVABLE BASE: With the safe springform mechanism moving, storing and baking cakes couldn't be any easier, the spring loaded latch and removable loose base quickly and easily releases the cake

FREEZER AND FRIDGE SAFE: This essential Cake Tin can store baked goods in the fridge or freezer, the ability to go from freezer to oven is ideal for pre baking, and reheating from frozen when needed to keep baked goods fresher for longer
NON-STICK: Remove baked cakes with ease with this quality non stick coating; Releases cakes and bakes time and time again; The non-stick is PFAS, PTFE and BPA free
DURABLE: The cake pan is made from carbon steel with steel clip; Perfect size measuring 20 x 6.8 and inner size of 18.3 x 6.6 cm
description: From the brand Previous page Chef Aid is the most affordable brand and offers an extensive range of products for the kitchen and home. Chef Aid is based on saving you money without compromising on quality. A complete range of solutions for the home.
